name: Kentucky Pecan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in the order listed.
2. Beat at a medium speed of the mixer until smooth.
3. Stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) until stiff.
5. Fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
6. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
8. Invert the pan, and cool the cake completely.
9. Remove from the pan.
10. Sprinkle the top of the cake with powdered sugar.
